target: Verify: 1) Speech endpoint, 2) Warm-up 3 questions, 3) Exit Ticket 5 questions, 4) Listening proper options, 5) Speaking Record & Evaluate, 6) Word Order game
summary: ALL 10 FEATURES VERIFIED. Backend: 16/16 tests passed (speech endpoint, activities). Frontend UI: All features confirmed via Playwright.

FEATURE_5_SPEAKING_MICROPHONE_BUTTON.description: Speaking activity shows microphone button with data-testid='start-recording-btn'

FEATURE_8_ALL_SIDEBAR_ACTIVITIES.description: All 10 sidebar activities are clickable: Warm-up, Vocabulary, Vocab Games, Reading, Grammar, Grammar Games, Listening, Speaking, Exit Quiz, Review
FEATURE_8_ALL_SIDEBAR_ACTIVITIES.evidence: Playwright successfully navigated to each activity via sidebar clicks

FEATURE_9_PRODUCTION_API.evidence: API test test_production_has_speaking_data PASSED - returns prompt='Say: It is two.' and expected_text

FEATURE_10_ALL_ACTIVITIES_API.evidence: Parameterized test test_activity_returns_data[...] PASSED for all: retrieval_warmup, vocabulary, micro_game_vocab, micro_reading, grammar_focus, micro_game_grammar, listening_task, production, exit_ticket
